comments.author: @susanroot1117
comments.text: My husband and I are moving to Panama at the end of this year 2026.  We are in love with this beautiful Country and the warm, friendly people.  I do worry that it is becoming the Country that everyone has heard of. There are an increasing number of ex-pats which causes greater need for development and a rising cost of living for all Panamanians.  I’m so excited but I feel guilty as we don’t want to become part of a potential problem.

replies.author: @ronwheeler4529
replies.text: It’s on our list of possible moves in 4 years. Would love to hear your plan

comments.author: @jimyback
comments.text: The depth of field in these 4K shots is stunning. You managed to capture the true soul of Panama by focusing entirely on traditional, everyday life rather than typical tourist destinations. A beautiful and deeply respectful visual journey.

comments.text: Panama took off after the canal brought in commerce. They are building enclaves like green city for people to retire to

comments.author: @LifeNest-3
comments.text: I want to visit  Panama.

comments.author: @mikecastillo6993
comments.text: I've lived here since 2014. Originally working in aviation, I retired just months before con-vid. We moved to the interior just meters from where my wife was born. The farming culture is a simple culture. Nobody is getting rich. So the focus is on other things. Happiness, kindness, cooperation, sharing and living with a mutual respect are the culture. No one here is going to design the next wing foil - but they are the finest example of humanity I've observed in 28 countries and 4 continents.

comments.text: Thank you for sharing this video. It really accurate about our culture, lifestyle and way of living here in Panama. I am panamanian. We welcome you all.

replies.author: @THEWONDERSOFDA
replies.text: @BestTravel2 most welcome. Here you can learn to say POLLO and POLLERA. In the video was mentioned with one l. It is double LL. Cheers!

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: Thank you so much for your kind words and for confirming the accuracy of the video from a Panamanian perspective. That means a lot to me! And the welcome is truly appreciated.

comments.author: @FrancisLuis19
comments.text: I'm thinking whether I should take an internship here on October. It's so far from Asia but it looks lovely and peaceful

replies.author: @misspanama6963
replies.text:
Also...keep in mind Panama has alot of holidays in November and everything is closed.

Nov 3 & Nov 28: Independence day from Columbia and Spain.

Nov 4: Flag day

Nov 5: Colon day

Alot of celebrations on those days and vibrant marching bands.

replies.author: @misspanama6963
replies.text:
Come and visit my homeland...You only live once. We have a huge Chinese-Panamamian population. And CHOP Suey is very popular here (cooked Panamanian style.

For City: Try Panama City
Hotel: Residence Inn by Marriott, they have suite rooms with fridge and stove.
It is in a very central location called Punta Pacifica.

Caribbean Beach Side: Where my family from

Bocad del Toro Archipelago  (Isla Colon & Isla Carenero)

Two beautiful beaches:
Isla Zapatilla 
Playa Estrella (Star Fish Beach) 

Mountains area:
Boquete - cooler climate, 70s

World famous for coffee 

Our famous Rums:
Ron Abuelo
Second Herrera

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: That's a great opportunity! Panama is indeed a beautiful and peaceful country, and an internship here could be a truly enriching experience despite the distance.

comments.author: @thebroadlife
comments.text: Panama is one of those countries that many people know because of the canal, but rarely because of the people and everyday life. This video does a great job showing that Panama is much more than a shipping route, with its unique culture, beautiful landscapes, and fascinating blend of modern cities and traditional communities.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: I completely agree! It's so much more than just the canal, and I'm glad the video showcased that.

Thank you for taking us beyond the canal and showcasing the true spirit of this fascinating country. 🇵🇦👏🌴
